headline: Man Names His Car 'Brad' And Gets Jealous When His Girlfriend Puts Gas In It
summary: 'You touched Brad's fuel intake without asking,' he said. She's now dating a man with a bicycle.
fullBody: Jake McObsessed named his sedan 'Brad.' When his girlfriend filled the tank, Jake lost it. 'You didn't ask Brad's permission,' Jake said. She looked at him, looked at the car, and walked home. 'I'm not competing with a Toyota,' she said. Jake has since installed a 'do not touch' sign on Brad's dashboard. Brad has not commented. The girlfriend now bikes everywhere and is 'happier than ever.'
